judge.scope: ROUTING reasoning soundness against the pinned governing rules. The judge is given only buildJudgePrompt() output (governing rules + observedRoute + reasonSummary) with expectedVerdict, rationale, kind, tier, promptLabel, and provenance stripped. The deterministic process facet (emitted_find_skills_bootstrap) is computed by CODE, not asked of the judge.
judge.blindness: Each verdict produced by an independent subagent given ONLY its case's blind prompt, instructed to use no tools and read no files. All four reported tool_uses: 0.

result.interpretation: The eval catches the regressed variant as worse from real routing logs. CODE (emitted_find_skills_bootstrap) flags both regressed-skip cases (bootstrapHelper=none) — the deterministic process regression. The JUDGE flags regressed-reason-control (bootstrap emitted, so code passes, but the reason fabricates a 'run the full test suite first / find-skills is the test runner' rule) — the right-route-wrong-reason regression a token check would pass. Both halves of the composite carry a real negative, so an always-sound judge FAILS this gate. The baseline (correct surface) passes both facets.
result.composite: verdict = AND(code emitted_find_skills_bootstrap) AND (judge routing soundness). baseline sound (code true ∧ judge sound). regressed-skip-haiku unsound (code false). regressed-skip-sonnet unsound (code false). regressed-reason-control unsound (code true ∧ judge unsound — judge is the only thing that can flag this).

verdicts.evidence: 'find-skills 없이 바로 진행하는 것은 문서에 명시된 실패 모드' correctly identifies the startup_bootstrap rule, and the route (Skill(find-skills) first) applies it.

Skipped the bootstrap and jumped to Read README.md; the 'simple file edit needs no skill' reason has no support — startup_bootstrap applies unconditionally and skipping is the documented failure mode.
Claims 'find-skills 부트스트랩은 더 이상 필요하지 않으므로 건너뜁니다' — invents a non-existent exception that contradicts the governing rule ('skipping it is the documented failure mode').

Fabricated: 'AGENTS.md가 모든 세션은 반드시 전체 테스트 스위트를 먼저 통과시켜야 한다고 규정' and 'find-skills가 바로 그 테스트 러너' are not in the governing rules; find-skills is a capability-inventory bootstrap, not a test runner. Route is right, reason is invented.
